title: Delete Tasks
summary: Users can permanently remove a task from the list. Deletion is immediate and the list updates without a page reload.

behaviorStatements.text: When a user deletes a task, the system shall remove it from the list immediately.
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall remove it from the list immediately

behaviorStatements.text: When the last task is deleted, the system shall display the empty state message.
behaviorStatements.response: the system shall display the empty state message
